data.title: Two Arizona Bitcoin Reserve Bills Pass Senate and Head to House for Deliberation
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: According to market news, two Bitcoin reserve bills in Arizona, the United States, have been passed by the Senate and submitted to the House of Representatives for deliberation. It is reported that SB 1025 was voted through with "17-11-2".

data.title: DeFi protocol Elixir releases video hinting at token launch
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News DeFi protocol Elixir released a video, which may be intended to hint at the release of protocol tokens. Elixir completed a $8 million Series B financing last year, and the company's valuation reached $800 million.

data.title: Bitcoin concept stocks rose, MARA rose more than 10%
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Bitcoin concept stocks rose, Marathon Digital (MARA.O) rose more than 10%, Riot Blockchain (RIOT.O) rose more than 6%, and Coinbase (COIN.O) rose more than 3%. Bitcoin rebounded to above $84,000, having previously fallen below $80,000. (Jinshi)

data.title: LBank will list Major Frog (MAJORFROG)
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to official news, LBank will launch Major Frog (MAJORFROG) at 23:40 (SGT) on February 28, and open the MAJORFROG/USDT trading pair. Currently, the deposit service is open, and the withdrawal service will be open at 23:00 on March 1.

BNB Surpasses 590 USDT with a Narrowed 2.72% Decrease in 24 Hours
data.description: On Feb 28, 2025, 15:24 PM(UTC). According to Binance Market Data, BNB has crossed the 590 USDT benchmark and is now trading at 590.119995 USDT, with a narrowed narrowed 2.72% decrease in 24 hours.

data.title: Bitcoin(BTC) Surpasses 84,000 USDT with a Narrowed 1.85% Decrease in 24 Hours
data.description: On Feb 28, 2025, 15:25 PM(UTC). According to Binance Market Data, Bitcoin has crossed the 84,000 USDT benchmark and is now trading at 84,021.023438 USDT, with a narrowed narrowed 1.85% decrease in 24 hours.

data.title: Analyst: The cryptocurrency market is expected to improve in March and the panic will not last long
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Bitcoin prices rebounded with the release of PCE data, and optimism is growing that macroeconomic conditions will ease next month. Julien Bittel, head of macro research at Global Macro Investor, said that when the macro environment may affect Bitcoin, it brought good news to bulls. He said: "When financial conditions tighten, liquidity will be exhausted and economic surprises will begin to slow down. The "panic" that affects the market will not last long, and all this will be reversed next month. In the past two months, financial conditions have improved rapidly-the dollar has fallen, bond yields have fallen, and oil prices have fallen-which has laid the foundation for the recovery of the cryptocurrency market." (Cointelegraph)
